case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. ANRII KNYSH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,862.84 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT KNYSH, ANRII ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT KNYSH, ANRII

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO CREDIT UNION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAM LOUISE LUU BSA OFFICER. DEFENDANT ANRLL KNYSH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6/24/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP RTN TO SEND."
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
